pending.body: finding_summary: `milestone status --help` now claims that omitting `milestone_id` uses the active milestone, but `handle_status` actually lists every milestone when no ID is provided. affected_files: `src/cli/milestone.rs:120-121`, `src/cli/milestone.rs:763-820`. remediation_hint: Reword the `long_about` to describe the real no-arg behavior, or change `handle_status` to resolve the active milestone instead of listing all milestones.

finding_summary: `milestone run --help` promises it will "Create and start a task," but the implementation can also adopt an existing bead-backed project and then `resume` or `sync-milestone` it without creating anything new. affected_files: `src/cli/milestone.rs:92-93`, `src/cli/milestone.rs:1068-1076`, `src/cli/milestone.rs:1181-1192`. remediation_hint: Rephrase the help to say the command starts or resumes the next actionable bead's task run, without promising task creation.

status_summary: running: final review restart round 5 -> Plan and Implement
